DETROIT_ABANDONED: You failed to secure your target.
DETROIT_DOCTOR_DEAD: Dr. Pierre Danois has been killed.
DETROIT_LEAVING_MISSION: You are leaving the mission area!
DETROIT_OBJECTIVE_FAIL_JETBIKE: You failed to keep up with Gideon.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_IFYOUHAVEAQ: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7If you have a question, ask someone with a red badge.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_IKNOWYOUALL: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7I know you all have a lot of questions about the cleanup. I'll try to give you as much info as I have.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_ONCEYOURDNA: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7Once your DNA is in the system, you'll be assigned a job.  Now, there is some fexibility, we want your time here to be happy, but we do need to match skills with tasks.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_REMEMBERNOT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7Remember, nothing happens unless you get your DNA chip. Kids and adults alike, no exceptions, no excuses ...everyone needs a DNA chip.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_SECTORSATHR: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7Sectors A through F will be getting cleaning details starting tomorrow. I'm sure a lot of you are happy to hear about that.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WEAPPRECIAT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7We appreciate your patience. Just wanted to give everyone a status update.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WERELOOKING: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7We're looking at a rolling schedule starting next month.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_WEREREOPENI: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7We're re-opening the Sector C cafeteria on Monday.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_ATR_YOULLBEWONT: ^2Atlas Commander: ^7You won't be able to collect any rations until you're DNA chipped.  DNA chip--sounds painful I know, but it's really a simple procedure that just helps us help you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_ANEMPTYCITY: ^2Gideon: ^7An empty city without police or eye witnesses. Good place to hide something. Or someone.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_BEENGOINGTW: ^2Gideon: ^7Twenty-two days straight.  The KVA doesn't take a break, neither do we.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_CLEANUPCREW: ^2Gideon: ^7Clean up vehicle up ahead. No one's supposed to be in this sector.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_COPYPROPHET: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy, Prophet. Hitting checkpoint blue in five.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_GOOD: ^2Gideon: ^7Good. We need to get off the X. Move out.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_HEWILLBE: ^2Gideon: ^7He will be. I'll make sure of it.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_IFTHEKVAHAV: ^2Gideon: ^7If the KVA have been operating under disguise, there could be more of them than we thought.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_IMEXTERNAL: ^2Gideon: ^7I'm external.  Bottom of the fire escape.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_JOKERIVEGOT: ^2Gideon: ^7Joker, I've got bodies. Looks like a clean-up crew. Hazmat suits missing. Treat all hazmats as hostile.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_JOKERPARKER: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell and I are taking the north side, you two are south. RV on Bates Street.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_KEEPITONAUT: ^2Gideon: ^7Sync to me, keep it on autopilot.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_LINKUPPOINT: ^2Gideon: ^7Link up point up ahead, twelve o'clock.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_MITCHELLIMS: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, I'm seeing a lot of movement. Stay hidden.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_MITCHELLMIT: ^2Gideon: ^7Bollocks. If you can, push to the south side.  Link up there.
^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell? Mitchell? Hold tight, I'll try to get down to you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_MOREONTHEWA: ^2Gideon: ^7More on the way! Kick it off!
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_NEEDTOACCEL: ^2Gideon: ^7Need to accelerate our timeline. Get ready to drop em.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_PROPHETBRAV: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, Bravo-two-one. Moving past phase line Delta.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_PROPHETWERE: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, we're at checkpoint blue, moving through the school.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_SETTHEBREAC: ^2Gideon: ^7This is it. Mitchell, hit the door.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_THATSWHATTH: ^2Gideon: ^7That's what they all say. Just before the screaming starts.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_THEYREPROTE: ^2Gideon: ^7They're protecting our target. We still locked in on him?
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_BRK_WELLKEEPOUR: ^2Gideon: ^7We'll keep our heads on a swivel.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_CV1_ISTILLHAVEN: ^2Civilian 1: ^7I still haven't been able to reach him.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_CV3_THEYSAYITSG: ^2Civilian 3: ^7They say it's going to be safe.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_DCR_YOUTHINKTHI: ^2Doctor: ^7You think this changes anything? You have no idea what he's capable of. You are all dead! We are dead!
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_BIOMETRICTR: ^2Joker: ^7Biometric trace has a lock on him. Still at the hospital.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_MIDTOWNHOSP: ^2Joker: ^7Dr. Pierre Danois.  He's in the midtown hospital. We're green.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_THEYWEREGOI: ^2Joker: ^7They were going to start moving people back in next month. Then the KVA showed up, now everything's on lock-down.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_WEREATTHECH: ^2Joker: ^7We're at the checkpoint on Bates street. Got KVA everywhere.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_JKR_WHATTHEHELL: ^2Joker: ^7What the hell are the KVA doing in Detroit, boss?
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_KVA_BAUERDOYOUR: ^2KVA: ^7Bauer, do you read me? Radio check, radio check. Bauer! Moving to you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_ATTENTIONCUR: ^2Pa: ^7Attention: curfew is in one hour. Repeat, curfew is in one hour. Thank you.
^2PA: ^7Attention: curfew is in one hour. Repeat, curfew is in one hour. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_CURFEWISNOWI: ^2Pa: ^7Curfew is now in effect for Sectors A through D. Please return to your housing units. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_NONCOMPLIANC: ^2Pa: ^7Non-compliance with your security protocol contract will result in immediate prosecution. Speak to your security coordinator if you have any questions.
^2PA: ^7Non-compliance with your security protocol contract will result in immediate prosecution. Speak to your security coordinator if you have any questions.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_REMEMBERTOHA: ^2Pa: ^7Remember to have your identification badges on you at all times.
^2PA: ^7Remember to have your identification badges on you at all times.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_REPORTANYSUS: ^2Pa: ^7Report any suspicious activity to your security coordinator.
^2PA: ^7Report any suspicious activity to your security coordinator.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PA_THISISSAFETY: ^2Pa: ^7This is safety reminder. Please keep all possessions within your housing unit. Unattended items will be confiscated. Thank you.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_BRAVOTWOONE: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo two-one, Dr. Danois is holding position at the hospital. Clock's ticking.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_COPYTHATBRA: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy that, Bravo two one. Welcoming party awaiting.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_ISRDETECTIN: ^2Prophet: ^7ISR detecting movement north west at a hundred meters from your position.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_PRT_THEDOCTORSN: ^2Prophet: ^7Remember, capture only. We need him to find Hades.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DETROIT_TRS_ROGERGOODTO: ^2Torres: ^7Good to go. Bikes are prepped, timeline is locked in.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_BRK_PROPHETTARGETIS: ^2Gideon: ^7Prophet, target is secured. Taking him in for interrogation. Gideon out.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_ILIKETOKNOWWHOS: ^2Gideon: ^7I like to know whose watching my back, mate.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_LETSGETITDONE: ^2Gideon: ^7Four years of hunting down Hades, and his right hand man turns up at our doorstep. Fucking brilliant.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_NOFUCKINHOLIDAY: ^2Gideon: ^7No fuckin' holiday, but they've got food, water, security. All courtesy of Atlas.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_NOWTHEKVAHAVETH: ^2Gideon: ^7Now the KVA have the balls to move in next door.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_GDN_TWOANDAHALFMILL: ^2Gideon: ^7Two and a half million people live in camps just like this one.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_JKR_WEGOTNOCOVERON: ^2Joker: ^7We got no cover on this street, boss.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_JKR_YOUSUREWEREOKAY: ^2Joker: ^7You sure we're okay with this boss?
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_KNX_REACTIONARYFORC: ^2???: ^7Reactionary forces are inbound, we got ya covered. Now you take the doctor and move out while you can.
SUBTITLE_DETROIT_DET_MCH_GOTFOUROPERATIV: ^2AST: ^7Got four operatives on bikes heading in. Mission order 5527.
